element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns timer-based bomb mechanics in controlled enemy density
Core navigation mechanic; teaches spatial planning and bomb chain reactions
Low-threat enemy types in early worlds; difficulty increases by world
Extends tactical options; encourages wall destruction exploration
Increases positioning options and escape capability
Enables complex trap patterns and multi-point control

element_introduction_order.element: Themed world progression with new enemy types
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each world introduces enemy behavior variants; difficulty scaling via enemy AI
Core progression mechanic; teaches spatial exploration and bomb puzzle-solving
Capstone to each world; combines all learned mechanics against single powerful enemy
Shift from spatial puzzle-solving to pure combat; continuous wave spawning
Advanced tactical options; situational use for overcoming specific enemy patterns

typical_relief_triggers: Enemy killed by bomb chain reaction
Safe zone reached after bomb detonation
Exit door reached and stage cleared
typical_tension_triggers: Limited bomb count forcing tactical choices
Soft walls blocking exit access (hidden door)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Burst-paced with clear tension peaks at bomb commitment; relief cycles through successful detonations and safe repositioning. Early worlds allow measured planning; later worlds force reactive speed-based decisions.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Soft walls concealing items and exit doors; wall destruction reveals secrets and progression path
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden exit door under random soft wall requires systematic wall destruction to find; items appear from destroyed walls and defeated enemies

difficulty_curve.early_game: Controlled enemy counts and predictable movement patterns in Worlds 1-2; teaches core bomb mechanics and spatial navigation in safe context
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Worlds 3-4 introduce more aggressive enemy AI and increased enemy density; player must combine firepower/speed items with tactical positioning
difficulty_curve.late_game: World 5 robot battles eliminate destructible walls, forcing pure combat skills; World 6 returns to wall-based puzzles with maximum enemy difficulty
notable_spikes: World 1 Stage 8 (first boss): introduces single powerful enemy requiring learned mechanics
World 5 all stages: arena format eliminates spatial puzzle element; continuous wave spawning increases tension
World 6 stages: final world combines high enemy density with complex wall layouts

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 6 worlds contains 7 regular stages (escalating difficulty) plus 1 boss stage. Worlds 1-4 and 6 use destructible wall mazes; World 5 uses open arena format.
Stage progression requires finding hidden door under soft walls. Player must destroy walls strategically to reveal exit while managing enemy threats.
World 5 deviates from maze structure: no destructible walls, no exit doors. Waves of robot Bombermen spawn continuously. Combat ends when all robots defeated; next wave enters immediately.
Each world's stage 8 is a boss fight. Boss AI increases in sophistication and bomb/movement speed across worlds. Requires application of mastered mechanics.
Early stages limit player to basic bomb mechanics. Firepower, speed, and bomb-count items unlock in destroyed walls, enabling new tactical approaches in later stages.

sources_used: wikipedia: Super Bomberman (gameplay section, normal game, battle mode descriptions)
